description: A pair of black casual shoes with a silver-toned accent, has central lace-ups and low-top stylingSynthetic mesh upper with stitched detail and overlays, glossy midfoot, reinforced heel collarSoft tongue and inner, and cushioned footbed with branding at the heelTough and textured rubber outsole with patterned groovesWarranty: 3 months against manufacturing defectsWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
